title.en: View D from D. The top (bottom) layer is on the left (right) of the image. Hold SQ1 such that FL side of equator (middle layer) is short edge. Never rotate the entire SQ1. Left hand always grips short side of equator. All images are top view. ±x±y = turn U layer (±30x)° and D layer (±30y)°; / = rotate right side 180°; n = n0; n = 0n; U = 3; D = 3; M2 = 1/-1-1/01.

content.en:
Move Notation

Assume X, Y, Z, W are turns. There is a spacing between 2 moves. For inverse move, use straight apostrophe after normal move. A straight apostrophe (pronounced as "prime") means to turn the face in the opposite direction (counterclockwise).

不在更新

Inverse

Pause

Commutator

(X Y)' = Y' X'

.

[X, Y] = X Y X' Y'

Conjugate

Grouping

Repetition

X: Y = [X: Y] = X Y X'

(X Y) (Z W) = X Y Z W

(X Y)2 = X Y X Y

(X Y)2' = Y' X' Y' X'

Commutator/Conjugate/Nesting

X: [Y, Z] = [X: [Y, Z]] = X Y Z Y' Z' X'

Face Turns

Each move means to turn that side 90° clockwise, as if you were facing that side.

U (Up)

D (Down)

R (Right)

L (Left)

F (Front)

B (Back)

Slice Turns

E, M, S follow D, L, F directions. Because M is closer to L than R in the alphabet.

E (Equator)

M (Middle)

S (Standing)

Rotations

x, y, z follow R, U, F directions. x is closer to R than L in the alphabet.

View D from D. The top (bottom) layer is on the left (right) of the image. Hold SQ1 such that FL side of equator (middle layer) is short edge. Never rotate the entire SQ1. Left hand always grips short side of equator. All images are top view. ±x±y = turn U layer (±30x)° and D layer (±30y)°; / = rotate right side 180°; n = n0; n = 0n; U = 3; D = 3; M2 = 1/-1-1/01.

Karnaukh Notation. E = 3-3, e = 33, u = 2-1, d = -12, M = 1-1.

content.zh:
转动记号

假设X, Y, Z, W为转动. 两个转动间需用空格隔开. 在正转动后加上直撇号' (读作"撇"), 得到逆转动.

逆

(X Y)' = Y' X'

停顿

.

换位子

[X, Y] = X Y X' Y'

共轭

X: Y = [X: Y] = X Y X'

分组

(X Y) (Z W) = X Y Z W

重复

(X Y)2 = X Y X Y

(X Y)2' = Y' X' Y' X'

共轭换位子

X: [Y, Z] = [X: [Y, Z]] = X Y Z Y' Z' X'

A/B = A B A2' B' A

= A: [B, A2'] = A': [A2, B]

SQ1

底层从底下往上看. 顶（底）层在图片的左（右）侧. 拿SQ1让赤道（中层）的前面的左侧为短边. 不要整体旋转SQ1. 左手始终握住赤道的短边. 所有图均为俯视图. ±x±y = 转U层 (±30x)° 并转D层 (±30y)°; / = 旋转右侧180°; n = n0; n = 0n; U = 3; D = 3; M2 = 1/-1-1/01.
